title: rosa dumalis f. oblonga
intro: Rosa dumalis f. oblonga is a variant of the Rosa dumalis plant, which is a type of fragrant, climbing rose native to the Himalayas. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and inflammation due to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Rosa dumalis f. oblonga include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Rosa dumalis f. oblonga can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
